text:
1. Determine the time difference: US/Eastern is 5 hours behind UTC and US/Hawaii is 10 hours behind UTC, so the time difference is 5 hours.
2. Add the time difference to the given time: 4:00 + 5:00 = 9:00.
3. Since the time difference is positive and we are moving forward in time, the date remains the same.
FINAL_ANSWER: 09:00
